---
title: "MFC CDT Jamboree"
subtitle: "Windsor, 13-15 April 2026"
---

# Welcome

Welcome to the MFC Jamboree!
<!-- https://crsl4.github.io/julia-workshop/ -->
<!-- https://github.com/crsl4/julia-workshop/blob/main/_quarto.yml -->

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Presenter |
|---|---|---|
| 10:00–10:15 | Introduction | Almut and Rukia |
| 10:15–11:00 | Student presentations | TBD |
| 11:00–11:45 | Mini workshop | Nicola Rennie |
| 11:45–12:00 | Discussion | All |

## Materials

- [Paper](materials/sdata2017175.pdf)
- [Slides](materials/MFC_CDT_Jamboree_2026.pdf)
- [Nicola Rennie's Lectures](https://nrennie.rbind.io/MFC-CDT-data-viz/)
- [Dataset](...)
- [Python example code](example-code/read-data.py)
- [R code](example-code/read-data.R)


## In preparation for the workshop

Participants are encouraged to:

1. clone the repository  
2. look through the preparation material  
3. make sure Python/R runs locally  
4. come with questions
